title: Account
description: Profile, password, and tenant team (when you are an administrator).

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Name and photo shown in the app.
profile.name: Name

password.title: Password
password.description: Change the password used to sign in with email and password.
password.hintNoPassword: Accounts created via invite or without a local password cannot use this until they set a password from the link.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Deactivating your account ends the session and blocks future logins.
danger.confirmHelp: This soft-deletes your access. Recovery may require support.

members.title: Tenant team
members.description: Roles of users linked to this tenant.
members.removeConfirm: Remove this member from the tenant?
